CustomField.description: Used to surface Properties with incomplete property data to send property invitations.
CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__City__c), '-Missing City'+BR(),'') + IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Postal_Code__c), '-Missing Postal Code'+BR(),'') + IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Image_URL__c), '-Missing Image URL'+BR(),'') + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c)), '-Missing Number of Bedrooms'+BR(),'') + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bathrooms__c)), '-Missing Number of Bathrooms'+BR(),'') + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Stories__c)), '-Missing Number of Stories'+BR(),'') + IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Square_Footage__c), '-Missing Square Footage of Home'+BR(),'') + IF(AND(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Monthly_Rent__c),ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__List_Price__c)), '-Missing List Price and Monthly Rent'+BR(),'') + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Style__c)), '-Missing Style'+BR(),'') + IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Property_Type__c)), '-Missing Property Type'+BR(),'') + IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Property_Web_Page__c), '-Missing Property Web Page'+BR(),'') + IF(ISBLANK(PHA__Response_Due__c), '-Missing Response Due'+BR(),'')
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used to surface Properties with incomplete property data to send property invitations.
CustomField.label: Property Invitation Flag
